entry.title: SLI
entry.content: Can anyone please tell me how to generate COO and SLI in preference? (inSAP GTS)

entry.title: VALIDATE MATERIAL MASTER TEXT MM01
entry.content:
HELLO EXPERTS,

HOW CAN WE VALIDATE OR TO STOP THASYSTEM CAN NOT ALLOW TO MAKE NEW DUPLICATE MATERIAL. WE ARE USING PUBLIC CLOUD AND SYSTEM IS ALLOWING TO MAKE DUPLICATE MATERIAL.

entry.title: How to transport migration cockpit project and objects from Dev to Qas in S4 Hana public cloud.
entry.content: How to transport migration cockpit project and objects from Development to Quality in S4 Hana Public Cloud for file and staging approach.

entry.title: CAP: View for entity not generated in subscribed tenants
entry.content:
Hello,

we developed a CAP Java Springboot app deployed to BTP CF space with Hana DB. The app uses multi-tenancy.  A tenant is already subscribed to this app in the test space. 

On database layer we already created some time ago a database table "RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults". This database table is visible in the Hana schema of the subscribed tenant. 

We now want to create a new entity in our service.cds file referencing that db table ( the last line is new)

using com.sap.apm.rules.eiot as apm from '../db/data-model';

@path: '/RuleExecutionsService/v1'
service RuleExecutionsService @(restrict: [{ grant: 'READ', to:  ['Rules_C','Rules_R','Rules_U','Rules_D'] }]){
   @readonly entity RuleExecutions as projection on apm.RuleExecutions;
   @readonly entity RuleExecutionTechnicalObjects as projection on apm.RuleExecutionTechnicalObjects;
   @readonly entity RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectMonitoringResults as projection on apm.RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectMonitoringResults;
   @readonly entity RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults as projection on apm.RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults;
}

We see that in the generated schema-hana.sql file a new create view statement is generated for the new entity: 

CREATE VIEW RuleExecutionsService_RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults AS SELECT
  RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults_0.ID,
  RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults_0.technicalObject_ID,
  RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults_0.indicator_ssid,
  RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults_0.indicator_characteristicsInternalId,
  RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults_0.indicator_positionId,
  RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults_0.indicator_categoryName,
  RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults_0."TIMESTAMP",
  RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults_0.value,
  RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults_0.error_code,
  RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults_0.error_message
FROM com_sap_apm_rules_eiot_RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults AS RuleExecutionTechnicalObjectDerivationResults_0
WITH ASSOCIATIONS (
  MANY TO ONE JOIN RuleExecutionsService_RuleExecutionTechnicalObjects AS technicalObject ON (technicalObject.ID = technicalObject_ID)
);

 Our expectation is that when we deploy the app to the CF space the database schemas for all subscribed tenants get automatically updated and this view is available afterwards in those schemas. 

However, this does not happen. 

Question: What do we have to do ensure that the view appears in all Hana schemas of the subscribed tenants?

=====

@cap-js/asyncapi: 1.0.1
@cap-js/cds-types: 0.2.0
@cap-js/openapi: 1.0.4
@cap-js/sqlite: 1.7.3
@Sisn/cds: 8.0.4
@Sisn/cds-compiler: 5.0.6
@Sisn/cds-dk: 8.0.2
@Sisn/cds-dk (global): 7.9.2
@Sisn/cds-fiori: 1.2.3
@Sisn/cds-foss: 5.0.0
@Sisn/cds-hana: 2.0.0
@Sisn/cds-mtxs: 2.0.3
@Sisn/eslint-plugin-cds: 3.0.4
Node.js: v18.18.2
apm-rules-eiot-cds: 1.0.0
home: https://github.tools.sap/AssetPerformanceManagement/apm-rules-eiot
CAP Java SDK: 3.0.0
cds4j: 3.0.0
Spring Boot: 3.3.3
Maven: 3.9.5, home: /Users/D038325/Library/apache-maven-3.9.5
Java: 21.0.2, home: /Users/D038325/Library/Java/JavaVirtualMachines/sapmachine-jdk-21.0.2.jdk/Contents/Home
OS: Mac OS X, 14.6.1, arch: x86_64

entry.title: VENDER MSTER SETTING FROM BUSINESS PARTNER
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Please kindly help and advise me...

I'm now working for new setting of on Vendor Code and gotten the error message as below.

x The vendor which has Grouping 0001 cannot register. 

 For this solve, how should I do and how can I make the vendor?

The number the parent code has already registered...

Thank you for your time and Best regards,

entry.title: hdbcli seems to have a syntax error during connection
entry.content:
When trying to connect to HANA DB instance by using python lib 'hdbcli', there seems an mistake within the lib:

When passing parameter 'username' which is also provided explictly in the method 'connect(...)':

I find the solutions here: https://stackoverflow.com/q/77315479/17094981 

then there will be an error raised:

However if I use 'user' there, everything goes well:

SAP HANA Cloud Python

entry.title: cloud foundry deployment failed
entry.content: Getting this error after i perform cf deploy mta_archive command,

entry.title: about prefix adaptation
entry.content:
How can we maintain the configuration to Number Range and Prefix in eDocument Colombia documents? Where can we make this adaptation?

We kindly ask for your guidance.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Possibilities of Cost Center
entry.content:
Hello! I'm new to SAP HCM and have been assigned a task involving an employee who works for different organizations. The requirement is to assign cost centers from different companies with specific percentages, meaning 30% of the cost will be covered by Company A, 65% by Company B, and 5% by Company C. Could you guide me on how to configure this in SAP HCM?

Regards,

entry.title: How to create and authorize users in HDI Containers ?
entry.content:
Hi,

I use a HDI container on HANA Cloud from a Cloud Foundry app in python to perform machine learning operations. The results are stored in the corresponding HDI container schema.

I want to access the schema from a SAP Analytics Cloud via live model access.

This works fine for a connection to HANA using the users from the service keys from the HDI container.

Now the requirement is to assign SAC users certain rights depending on the dimensions. Since this seems to be impossible on the SAC, we would need to create users with these rights in the HANA HDI container. How can I create and maintain such users from the CF environment ? 

Any help is highly appreciated.

Regards

Marcus

entry.title: Regarding HR module
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

We are implementing FI, SD , MM  modules by using Grow with SAP S4 HANA (Public cloud)  for one of our clients. This is migration project where we are migrating from ECC system to S4 HANA.

Now our client wants to implement HR modules which will be suitable with Grow with SAP S4 HANA (Public cloud) therefore need your assistance.

  1. Can we add HR module with Grow with SAP S4 HANA (Public cloud)?
  2. Do we need to pay separate license cost ?
  3. What is the different between Grow with SAP S4 HANA (Public cloud) and successfcators?

Thank You, 

Rini Mukherjee 

+91-9038870937

entry.title: Hana Cloud Dashboard "Uh oh. Something went amiss."
entry.content:
Hello Community, I have been getting this error for few days now , when I go to view my Hana Cloud instance Dashboard. I get this error on cockpit page "Uh oh. Something went amiss." 

Any one facing same ? any idea what could be wrong.

entry.title: OBD DATE CAN CHANGE
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

Can we change the OBD date at table level?

entry.title: SAP edocument - Support Documents (Documento Soporte - Colombia) XML
entry.content:
According to the documentation (DOC-SUPSAP_S4HANA_CLOUD ), we can create Support Documents (Documento Soporte - Colombia) using either materials or services. However, when processing a Service Entry Sheet (SES), the unit of measure is not being recognized, resulting in an XML parsing error.

How can we address this issue?

entry.title: Calculation View created in the Business Application Studio trial version would not open
entry.content:
Hello All, 

Has anyone here experienced this with the Business Application Studio trial version? I've created a .hdbcalculationview file but I cannot open it to edit. Each time I try opening, it gets stuck in the Loading screen. Browser console shows below error but unable to figure out what's going on. Already tried clearing the browser cache couple of times but that did not help. Appreciate any suggestions! 

Core-preload.js:42 Uncaught (in promise) Error: failure during creation of required plugins ->

Error: Problems detected while checking service definition consistency:
Not all required services are provided:
Plugin: sap.watt.hana.editor.hdbdd missing required services ---> rndrtService

 

Regards,

Sreejith

entry.title: Q)Adjustment of production orders' scheduled time in HANA cloud is disabled
entry.content:
Dear community members,

 

I hope you are doing well.

An issue was found while I was testing production order integration with SAP Digital Manufacturing(MES). In app Create Production Order, scheduled time box cannot be adjusted. Then, it confirms without any adjustments after release. Related picture below:

Furthermore, parameters for scheduling such as Setup Time; Processing Time; Teardown Time; etc. of each operation cannot be maintained. Related picture below:

For your information, my team is using SAP DM TDD & Hana Cloud Partner Demo Customizing. I expect that I am missing some vital master data set.  

I appreciate your comment with opinion in advance.

 

Yours faithfully,

Wonpyo

#production order #scheduling order #create order

entry.title: How to trigger a PPF using web API
entry.content:
Hi members,

How can we trigger a PPF action using web API.

Please provide me if there is a blog or anything related to it.

Regards,
Bharath

entry.title: how to set alert on hana cloud and notify it by email
entry.content:
Could you inform me how to setup alert on HANA Cloud and send notification by email?
I need a notification when a "Used Memory" has reached a certain amount .

I have been observing memory usage from HANA cockpit and I need to get a notificaton when the "Used Memory" has reached certain amount.

I found that there are several documentations to acheive it but they seemed little complicated.

Is there any solution which is simple as possible? (no need to use SQL and other resources that can cost extra)

Here are some conditions
- by setting those up, there must be no affection on the instances, database and other running sevices (they shouldn't be stopped)

- need to know tha cost by setting them up (hope there is no cost)
- which authority is required 

Feel free to ask questions if any.

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to Retrieve Data from HANA DB Using CAP for OData Service in SAP Business Application Studio?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on a project where I need to retrieve data from an SAP HANA database using an OData service. I plan to use an OData adapter in SAP CPI (Cloud Platform Integration) for this purpose. From my understanding, I need to create a CAP (Cloud Application Programming) project in SAP Business Application Studio to expose the data via an OData service.

Could someone guide me through the steps to achieve this? Additionally, if there are any comprehensive documentation or tutorials available, please share them.

Thank you in advance for your assistance!

Best regards,

Anildeep

SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database SAP HANA service for SAP BTP SAP Business Application Studio Cloud Integration SAP Integration Suite SAP Cloud Application Programming Model

entry.title: How we can maintain location HANA Public cloud.
entry.content:
Hello All,

We want to maintain location in HANA Public cloud , Could you pls let us know how we can maintain the location in HANA Public cloud ?

On Premises system we are maintaining  the location through Tcode OP12 ( SAP Table name T499S)  , Same functionality we need HANA Public cloud. 

There is any Fiori Apps for maintaining the location ? Kindly help us.

 

Thank you 

JP
